query:
-- 查询物料计划中的物料数量
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT materialCode) as plan_material_count
FROM material_items
WHERE planId = (SELECT id FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1);

-- 查询ERP到货记录中的物料数量
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT materialCode) as erp_material_count
FROM actual_receipts
WHERE userId = (SELECT userId FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1);

-- 查询能匹配上的物料数量
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mi.materialCode) as matched_material_count
FROM material_items mi
INNER JOIN actual_receipts ar ON mi.materialCode = ar.materialCode
WHERE mi.planId = (SELECT id FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1)
  AND ar.userId = (SELECT userId FROM material_plans WHERE fileName LIKE '%1月5日-2月13日%' LIMIT 1);
